kaiyan@montajdigital.io.title: Catch-Up - Kaiyan Ali and Femi
kaiyan@montajdigital.io.summary: The team aims to enhance lead conversions by revamping the sales process through splitting calls into a triage and demo format, allowing for tailored presentations and better engagement. Pricing changes include simplifying offers by removing performance-based fees, restructuring costs to an upfront fee of £3k with subsequent £1k monthly payments, which is expected to lower customer acquisition costs. Insights reveal a current lead-to-appointment rate of 15 and a goal to reduce the cost per lead from £25 to £20. The introduction of a setter role is planned to increase appointment show rates, while a trial period of three months for the new pricing model will facilitate adjustments based on performance metrics, ensuring operational capacity aligns with new sales targets.

onboarding@closebot.ai.title: CloseBot Onboarding Call
onboarding@closebot.ai.summary: The session covered the core features of CloseBot, including bot behavior, source settings, and customization options like persona and job flow. Key highlights included the bot's auto-shutoff triggers, graceful goodbye messages, and availability controls that allow businesses to manage response times. Additionally, customizable personas shape the bot's tone, while features for booking management handle appointment changes and smart follow-ups based on customer engagement. The discussion also addressed issues related to booking flows due to empty calendar slots and highlighted limitations for users on basic plans, emphasizing the need for dynamic data handling. Finally, participants were reminded of ongoing support through AI and human assistance to resolve any issues.

christopher.andrew.anderson@gmail.com.title: Pre-Need Leads Demo | Christopher Anderson and Femi @ Acquiri
christopher.andrew.anderson@gmail.com.summary: The meeting focused on Raffee's burial-at-sea service, which faces challenges in lead acquisition and awareness within a niche market. Operating for four months with no conversions, the company currently has 5-10 monthly conversations but attributes slow sales to low lead quality and a lack of awareness among potential customers. The business relies on grassroots networking in the death care community due to budget constraints, avoiding costly digital ads until now. Pricing for services ranges from $500 to $4,000, targeting consumers actively exploring end-of-life options. A proposed digital strategy includes Meta ads to raise awareness and a lead nurturing funnel. Femi emphasized a 90-day trial with flexible payment options to facilitate cautious investment for the startup.
